name: Permutations
description: Calculez les permutations de n éléments pris r à r.
seo_description: Calculez les permutations de n éléments pris r à r. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Obtenez des resultats instantanes avec explication.
example_label: Find the number of permutations when selecting items from distinct items.
result_context: The permutations {perm} count the number of ways to arrange r items from n when order matters.
mistakes: Using combinations formule instead of permutations
Allowing r > n which gives invalid results
Confusing when order matters vs doesn't matter
